root.sql:
SELECT vr_nsk_015_005000.membership_no, vr_nsk_015_005000.prename, vr_nsk_015_005000.member_name, vr_nsk_015_005000.member_surname, vr_nsk_015_005000.receive_month_year, vr_nsk_015_005000.receipt_no, vr_nsk_015_005000.period_of_share, vr_nsk_015_005000.money_of_share, vr_nsk_015_005000.deposit_amount, vr_nsk_015_005000.emer_type, vr_nsk_015_005000.contract_of_emer_loan, vr_nsk_015_005000.period_of_emer_loan, vr_nsk_015_005000.principal_of_emer_loan, vr_nsk_015_005000.interest_of_emer_loan, vr_nsk_015_005000.emer_bal, vr_nsk_015_005000.norm_type, vr_nsk_015_005000.contract_of_norm_loan, vr_nsk_015_005000.period_of_norm_loan, vr_nsk_015_005000.principal_of_norm_loan, vr_nsk_015_005000.interest_of_norm_loan, vr_nsk_015_005000.norm_bal, vr_nsk_015_005000.special_type, vr_nsk_015_005000.contract_of_special_loan, vr_nsk_015_005000.period_of_special_loan, vr_nsk_015_005000.principal_of_special_loan, vr_nsk_015_005000.interest_of_special_loan, vr_nsk_015_005000.spec_bal, vr_nsk_015_005000.receive_year , vr_nsk_015_005000.receive_month, vr_nsk_015_005000.member_group_no FROM vr_nsk_015_005000 ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where 1=1 and vr_nsk_015_005000.receive_year = '!receive_year_1!' and vr_nsk_015_005000.receive_month between '!receive_month_1!' and '!receive_month_2!' and vr_nsk_015_005000.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no
/*WHERE*/
